commitMessage: Revert "Reapply "Reapply "Reapply "Reapply "Add R key to reset game from any state"""""

topics.title: Remove reset key shortcut and revert related UI changes
topics.trigger: A previously added feature allowing players to press a key to reset the game from any state was reverted, undoing the keyboard shortcut and its associated interface text.
topics.response:
- The keyboard handler in `src/main.ts` had the reset shortcut block removed, eliminating the ability to trigger a new game via a key press during any game state.
- The pause screen hide call that was added alongside the reset feature was also removed from the new-game startup logic in `src/main.ts`.
- The controls hint text in `index.html` was updated to remove the mention of the reset key, keeping the on-screen instructions accurate.
topics.decisions: The reset shortcut was reverted rather than kept or reworked. No conversation context is available to explain the reasoning, but the commit message indicates this is a revert of a revert chain, suggesting the feature introduced a problem significant enough to warrant repeated rollback attempts.
